stacy_voice.name: Stacy - Narrator
stacy_voice.vibe: Blonde woman from Days of Our Lives - warm, real, slightly dramatic but grounded

segments.text: I wasn't looking for connection. I was just trying to survive another day. Every text felt like a threat. Every notification sent me spiraling.
But then something shifted. I started paying attention to the patterns. Not the surface drama, but what was really happening underneath.
The anxious texting, the obsessive checking, the endless analyzing. It wasn't about him. It was about me.
That's when I realized: I have the power to change this. Not by controlling him, but by understanding myself.
And when I did? Everything changed. Not just with him, but with how I showed up in every single relationship.

danny_voice.name: Danny - Narrator
danny_voice.vibe: Hispanic man from Days of Our Lives - calm, thoughtful, authentic, warm

segments.text: I was closing off too. Building walls. Pretending I didn't care when I actually cared a lot.
Watching her transform made me realize something: vulnerability isn't weakness. It's actually where real strength comes from.
I had to look at myself. At the ways I was running, the ways I was protecting myself at the cost of real connection.
And when I stopped running? When I let myself be seen? Everything opened up.
Now I understand: the story wasn't about fixing what's broken. It was about becoming whole.
This is the story of how two people learned that understanding themselves was the key to understanding each other. And how that changed everything.
